## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Following the conventions

- [ ] The resource targets **Kentico Xperience developers** and is meant to be invoked by an AI assistant (not aimed at marketing, sales, or support).
- [ ] It does **not** duplicate the Kentico documentation — it links the relevant docs pages and adds context instead.
- [ ] A new resource is genuinely needed — the same result can't be achieved with an existing resource, a docs link, or a well-written prompt.
- [ ] It avoids assistant-specific features/fields, so it works across different AI assistants.
- [ ] Version of the marketplace manifest(s) or plugin(s) has been correctly updated (if applicable).
